title: Joy Dungca, Attorney - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## Joy Dungca, Attorney
Joy Dungca is an attorney of the Murthy Law Firm, with nearly nine years of legal immigration experience. She manages a high volume of U.S. immigration cases, focusing on immigrant petitions in the employment and family-based categories. Cases involve complex immigration matters pertaining to labor certification, adjustment of status, consular processing, and naturalization.
Prior to joining the Murthy Law Firm, Joy handled nonimmigrant matters including H1B, L-1, and O-1 petitions. Joy represents small and medium-sized business, as well as individual clients in the United States and around the globe.

### More on the Types of Cases Worked on by Attorney Joy Dungca
Risk of Interfiling on a Child’s CSPA Eligibility
